_publications._publicationTitle: PRC2-Inactivating Mutations in Cancer Enhance Cytotoxic Response to DNMT1-Targeted Therapy via Enhanced Viral Mimicry.

_contextSnippet: we used HiTSelect to rank each set of five shRNAs per gene in the library across all cell lines in the screen for depletion...DNMT1-specific shRNAs were ranked consistently among the top 10
details: Successfully ranked shRNA gene sets for depletion across all cell lines, identifying DNMT1-specific shRNAs among top 10 candidates in PRC2-loss but not PRC2-WT cell lines
